sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_string String, valid_date Int32);
SELECT id, date_string, (toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) IS NOT NULL) AS is_valid FROM test_dates WHERE date_string != '';
SELECT id, date_string FROM test_dates WHERE toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) IS NOT NULL AND id = 1;
SELECT id, date_string FROM test_dates WHERE date_string = '2020-01-01' AND toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) = 58829;
SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE (toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) IS NULL) AND (id = 2 OR id = 4);
SELECT MAX(toModifiedJulianDay(date_string)) as max_mjd FROM test_dates GROUP BY (ISNULL(date_string));
SELECT id, (toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) - 58829) AS julian_offset FROM test_dates HAVING julian_offset > -1;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM (SELECT id, date_string FROM test_dates WHERE date_string = '2020-01-01' OR date_string = '') AS subquery GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT (COUNT(*) > 0) as has_valid_dates FROM test_dates WHERE toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) IS NOT NULL OR date_string = '';
SELECT id, (SELECT toModifiedJulianDay('2020-01-01')) FROM test_dates AS td WHERE td.id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_dates_extended (id Int32, date_string String, valid_date Int32, constrained_date Date DEFAULT toDate('2000-01-01')) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates_extended VALUES (1, '2001-01-01', toModifiedJulianDay('2001-01-01'), toDate('2001-01-01'));
SELECT id, (toModifiedJulianDay(date_string) = toModifiedJulianDay(constrained_date)) AS dates_match FROM test_dates_extended WHERE id = 1;
